name: How long til workers comp pays after approval in North Salt Lake?

mainEntity.name: How long til workers comp pays after approval in North Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Temporary disability payments start within 15-30 days; medical immediate.**[5]

Utah requires prompt payment post-approval; delays trigger penalties.

- Weekly wage loss checks.
- Provider pays direct.
- Permanent later post-MMI.

Follow up aggressively. Lawyer speeds process.
